overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing first-person fishing at a western lake during golden hour sunset. The player casts a line, waits for a bite, reels in a fish, and the scene transitions to third-person view of the character cooking the catch over a campfire on the shore.

events.description: player casts fishing line forward into the lake water

agents.ego_description: standing in shallow water holding the fishing rod, waiting for a fish to bite

entered.detail: bamboo fishing rod with reel held in first-person view
calm reflective water surface showing sky reflections
large rocky cliff formations lining the lake shore
large rocky cliff formations lining the lake shore
golden hour sky with scattered clouds and bright sun near horizon

segments.scene_description: Standing at the edge of a western lake during golden hour, the player casts a fishing line into the calm water. The rod is held steady as the line extends toward the distant rocky mountains, with the sun setting behind the cliffs creating a warm backlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: active fishing spot with hooked fish

events.description: fish bites the line and rod bends significantly, player begins reeling
fish is pulled from the water and caught on the line
caught fish is held up in hand for inspection before the scene transitions

agents.ego_description: actively reeling in the fishing line with the rod bent under tension, then holding up the caught fish

notable_agents.action: fish struggling on the line, splashing in the water before being pulled out

segments.scene_description: The fishing line tenses as a fish bites, and the player begins reeling it in with the rod bending under the strain. The water ripples and splashes as the fish fights back, eventually being pulled from the water and held up for inspection.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite on lakeshore with cooking fire

events.description: perspective switches from first-person to third-person, location moves to campfire on shore
character places fish on stick and cooks it over the campfire

agents.ego_description: crouching by the campfire, cooking the fish on a stick over the flames, then eating the meal

entered.detail: burning campfire with visible flames on the ground
stick with skewered fish held over the fire
dry brown grass and dirt terrain of the lakeshore

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a third-person view showing the character crouched by a campfire on the lakeshore. The caught fish is skewered on a stick and cooked over the flames, with the character eating the meal as the sun continues to set behind the rocky terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a first-person fishing attempt on a calm lake to a third-person view of a meal being prepared by a campfire. It begins at the water's edge during golden hour, with the camera casting a line toward distant rocky mountains backlit by the setting sun. As the line tenses from a bite, the camera captures the strain of the rod and the splashing water before the fish is finally pulled from the lake and held up for inspection. The scene then shifts perspective to a third-person view of the character crouched on the lakeshore, where the caught fish is skewered on a stick and cooked over an open flame. The sequence concludes with the character eating the meal as the sun continues to dip behind the rugged terrain.
